# TinyVault

> TinyVault (`tvault`) is a single-binary, local-first secrets manager and MCP server, written in Go. It is language-agnostic: `tvault run` injects secrets as environment variables into any process. Secret payloads are encrypted per project with AES-256-GCM and an Argon2id-derived key hierarchy in a local bbolt database. Recommended MCP workflows minimize dedicated plaintext results; `vault_get_secret` is the deliberate plaintext-read tool, while subprocess stdout/stderr remains a separate leak path.

For agents: run `tvault docs features` for a machine-readable JSON manifest of every capability, then follow the discover → search → use loop. An MCP client should connect to `tvault mcp`.

## For AI agents

- [For AI Agents](https://www.tinyvault.dev/guide/for-ai-agents): start here — discovery, the discover→search→use loop, and the value-exposure boundaries.
- [MCP Overview & Setup](https://www.tinyvault.dev/mcp/): connect a client to `tvault mcp` (Claude Code, Codex, opencode, Hermes, Claude Desktop).
- [MCP Tools Reference](https://www.tinyvault.dev/mcp/tools): all 49 tools — inputs, returns, and the policy gate each sits behind.
- [MCP Recipes](https://www.tinyvault.dev/mcp/recipes): end-to-end agent workflows.
- [Access Policy](https://www.tinyvault.dev/mcp/access-policy): scope what an agent may do via `mcp-policy.yaml`.

## Guide

- [Guides overview](https://www.tinyvault.dev/guide/): choose a path by task or interface.
- [What is TinyVault?](https://www.tinyvault.dev/guide/what-is-tinyvault)
- [Getting Started](https://www.tinyvault.dev/guide/getting-started)
- [Core Concepts](https://www.tinyvault.dev/guide/concepts)
- [Environment Groups](https://www.tinyvault.dev/guide/env-groups): link projects as environments, detect drift, promote values, inherit, and seal all envs in one blob.
- [Codemap integration](https://www.tinyvault.dev/guide/codemap): the metadata-first MCP surface a code-graph indexer uses for rotation blast radius, least-privilege seals, credential freshness, and scoped execution.
- [Sharing Secrets](https://www.tinyvault.dev/guide/sharing) and [Committable Secrets](https://www.tinyvault.dev/guide/committable-secrets)

## Reference

- [CLI Reference](https://www.tinyvault.dev/cli/): every command and flag.
- [Configuration](https://www.tinyvault.dev/reference/configuration) and [Environment Variables](https://www.tinyvault.dev/reference/environment-variables)
- [Architecture](https://www.tinyvault.dev/reference/architecture) and [Security & Threat Model](https://www.tinyvault.dev/reference/security)
- [Troubleshooting & FAQ](https://www.tinyvault.dev/reference/troubleshooting)

## Optional

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/abdul-hamid-achik/tinyvault)
- [Changelog](https://www.tinyvault.dev/changelog)
